MODIFY.description: $SI/$FN Mismatch (Timestomping): $SI_Created='2019-01-01 00:00:00' vs $FN_Created='2026-02-25 14:32:00' (delta=2612 days 14:32:00). Classic signature of Timestomp.exe or Metasploit timestomp module.
Mass Timestamp Clustering: 120 file records share the exact timestamp '2020-01-01 00:00:00'. Typical of bulk timestomping via scripted tools.
Uniform 'Round' Timestamps: 121 records (84.6%) have a 00:00:00 time component. Strongly suggests scripted bulk timestamp modification.

FABRICATE.description: Prefetch Paradox: '/windows/prefetch/SDELETE.EXE-ABCDEF.pf' was executed at 2026-02-27 22:00:00 but has a creation time of 2026-02-27 23:00:00. The creation timestamp was backdated AFTER execution.
Impossible Sequence: Modification (2026-02-24 06:00:00) precedes Creation (2026-02-26 08:00:00). Indicates timestamp fabrication.
